goal: Add Discord slash commands and setup-gate validation to the Cloudflare Worker
summary: Phase 2 completed: created Kestra KV/secret client (kv.ts) and config validation (config.ts); added setup gate and forum channel filter to relay.ts; created slash command + modal handlers (commands.ts) and wired them into index.ts; created one-time deploy script (register-commands.ts) for global Discord command registration. TypeScript typecheck passes for all worker changes.
stepSummaries:
1. Add Kestra KV read/write helper functions and config validation middleware in worker/src/lib/ [verified]
  2. Add setup gate: check required config before relaying THREAD_CREATE; return friendly error if incomplete [verified]
  3. Handle APPLICATION_COMMAND and MODAL_SUBMIT interactions in worker/src/index.ts; add slash-command modal handler [verified]
  4. Create worker/scripts/register-commands.ts that registers slash commands globally via Discord REST API [verified]
